mods.name: MegaHoe
mods.description: Hoe tool overhaul with biome painter, extended terrain editing, and configurable radius

mods.name: MegaMegingjord
mods.description: Megingjord belt powers — carry weight, headlamp, swamp key, sealbreaker, wishbone, seafloor walk

mods.name: MegaFood
mods.description: MegaFood + MegaMead — 150 HP/Stam/Eitr food, 14 toggleable mead effects, configurable duration

mods.name: MegaShot
mods.description: Crossbow & firearms overhaul — scope/zoom, AOE, DoT, fire rate, magazine/reload system, Armageddon beam mode

mods.name: MegaQoL
mods.description: Quality of life — auto repair, refueller, ballista, map teleport, plant anywhere, instant mining (auto-prunes orphan config sections on launch)

mods.name: MegaStuff
mods.description: Storage — quick deposit (respects AzuEPI extra rows), chest auto-pickup, configurable chest sizes (up to 8 rows), craft from containers, pet feeder, ALT+click ignore-from-deposit, SHIFT+drag chest windows, AzuEPI Extra Rows cap bumped 5→8, auto-prunes orphan config sections on launch

mods.name: MegaFarming
mods.description: Mass farming — hold-key mass harvest pickables/beehives, grid plant any cultivator plant, plus custom plantables (bushes, mushrooms, thistle, fiddleheads) added to the Cultivator

mods.name: MegaFishing
mods.description: Fish auto-pull into containers/inventory with quality upgrade and configurable radius

mods.name: MegaFactory
mods.description: Auto-feed factory stations (Kiln, Smelter, Blast Furnace, Windmill, Spinning Wheel, Eitr Refinery) with work order system

mods.name: MegaTrainer
mods.description: In-game cheat trainer — god mode, fly, no cost, explore map, always rested, infinite eitr, tame all, no structure damage, fast skill up, speed/jump controls

mods.name: MegaBuilder
mods.description: Grid alignment for building placement — snap pieces to configurable grid sizes (0.5, 1, 2, 4) (auto-prunes orphan config sections on launch)

mods.name: MegaSkeletons
mods.description: Summoned skeleton buffs (health, speed, HoT, attack speed) + portal/dungeon persistence + remote skeleton detonator (hotkey-triggered AOE explosion)
